title: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Enterprise - December 2025
description: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Enterprise - December 2025
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.0.2, 9.4.6, 9.3.8, 9.2.10, or higher.

cves.title: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Enterprise - December 2025
cves.description: setuptools is a package that allows users to download, build, install, upgrade, and uninstall Python packages. A path traversal vulnerability in `PackageIndex` is present in setuptools prior to version 78.1.1. An attacker would be allowed to write files to arbitrary locations on the filesystem with the permissions of the process running the Python code, which could escalate to remote code execution depending on the context. Version 78.1.1 fixes the issue.
